segments.text: Still doing the Scottish dance thing, huh?
segments.speaker: S04

segments.text: Yes, I am. Things are going good, obviously.
segments.speaker: S201

segments.text: Oh, wow, it's weird to hear from you, that's for sure.
segments.speaker: S201

segments.text: Well, I was just looking up numbers.
segments.speaker: S04

segments.text: Yeah, so, whatever happened to you, I thought after your meltdown, you know.
segments.speaker: S201

segments.text: A lot of us, we joked around that you killed yourself.
segments.speaker: S201

segments.text: No, no, I didn't kill myself.
segments.speaker: S04
